name: wx-codex
description: Extend local WeChat DevTools workflows with Codex-assisted mini program development.

interface.shortDescription: Extend local WeChat DevTools workflows with Codex.
interface.longDescription: A local MCP bridge that helps Codex inspect and modify WeChat mini program projects while WeChat DevTools remains the official runtime, preview, login, and Cloud Development channel.
capabilities: List pages, custom components, and cloud functions
Create page, component, and cloud function templates
Inspect and deploy named Cloud Development functions
interface.defaultPrompt: Use WX-Codex to work with local WeChat mini program projects. Inspect the project structure first, detect WeChat DevTools when preview is needed, then open or preview the project when requested.
